summary: 17 comprehensive tests for channelsModel covering rendering, cursor navigation, delete confirmation, add-source wizard flow, and source type badges
notes: Tests channels.go sub-model. Covers: render empty/populated lists, cursor clamping, delete confirmation (d then y/esc), add-source wizard (a then 3-step: type→name→url), source type badges ([TG], [RSS], etc). Uses test fixtures makeChannels(). Key integration: tests channelsLoadedMsg, addSourceMsg message flow.
